GeneDef.label: facial brandless
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this brand have nothing special aside from remarkable manipulation of keeping body shape without visible brand, they also remember memory longer than others.

customEffectDescriptions.li: Moodlet or thought duration increased by 50%, total 75% with vibrant mind.

GeneDef.label: facial brand (club)
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this brand excel in growing, cutting, and harvesting plants.

GeneDef.label: facial brand (cog)
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this brand excel in crafting and manufacturing products.

GeneDef.label: facial brand (cross)
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this brand excel in tending and curing patients.

GeneDef.label: facial brand (delta)
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this brand excel in research and drug refining.

customEffectDescriptions.li: Nullify the research and reading debuff of their natural vibrant mind.

GeneDef.label: facial brand (diamond)
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this brand excel in artistic and creative artworks.

GeneDef.label: facial brand (fortitude)
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this brand excel in sustaining combat engagement with melee weapons.

GeneDef.label: facial brand (heart)
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this brand excel in culinary and brewery works.

GeneDef.label: facial brand (marksman)
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this brand excel in accurate aiming with ranged weapons.

GeneDef.label: facial brand (moustaChE)
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this brand excel in combat engagement compatibility with melee weapons.

GeneDef.label: facial brand (ohm)
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this brand excel in taming, training, and handling animals.

GeneDef.label: facial brand (spade)
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this brand excel in mining and drilling minerals.

GeneDef.label: facial brand (square)
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this brand excel in constructing and smoothing buildings.

GeneDef.label: facial brand (stellar)
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this brand excel in quick-firing with ranged weapons.

GeneDef.label: facial brand (rimstar)
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this brand excel in social and negotiation interactions.

GeneDef.label: corona hair
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene have sun corona-like hair.

GeneDef.label: facial brands
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene have a metallic brand-like symbol on their face. Depending on the symbol that decides their personality, one excels in a particular skill or condition.

customEffectDescriptions.li: This gene will add random facial brand upon addition, useful for player custom xenotype.

GeneDef.label: fusion metabolism
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene have special fusion reactions in their body that facilitate and optimize metabolism. This improves overall genetic and metabolic quality.

customEffectDescriptions.li: Do not mind eating anything.

GeneDef.label: magnetic voice
GeneDef.description: Carriers vibrate voice via magnetic wave that mimics human-like voice.

GeneDef.label: novaborn
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene have gas-like body that was born as a result of the death of a star.\nUpon death, they will explode just like how they were born.

customEffectDescriptions.li: Core gene required by most Novakin related genes.
Blessed by the star, turning their appearance into a gas-like body.
Offspring has a chance to inherit their parent xenotype.
Explode upon death, has a chance for Solar Flare to occur.

GeneDef.label: Plasma Colour Bodies
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene have a plasma color body. With multiple plasma pigment, one is randomly selected.

customEffectDescriptions.li: This gene will add random plasma color upon addition, useful for player custom xenotype.

GeneDef.label: Blue Plasma Colour
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene produce a pigment that turns their body shell a bright blue color.

GeneDef.label: Cyan Plasma Colour
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene produce a pigment that turns their body shell a bright cyan color.

GeneDef.label: Dark Plasma Colour
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene produce a pigment that turns their body shell a dark color.

GeneDef.label: Green Plasma Colour
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene produce a pigment that turns their body shell a bright green color.

GeneDef.label: Light Green Plasma Colour
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene produce a pigment that turns their body shell a bright light green color.

GeneDef.label: Orange Plasma Colour
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene produce a pigment that turns their body shell a bright orange color.

GeneDef.label: Pink Plasma Colour
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene produce a pigment that turns their body shell a bright pink color.

GeneDef.label: Purple Plasma Colour
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene produce a pigment that turns their body shell a bright purple color.

GeneDef.label: Red Plasma Colour
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene produce a pigment that turns their body shell a bright red color.

GeneDef.label: Violet Plasma Colour
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene produce a pigment that turns their body shell a bright violet color.

GeneDef.label: White Plasma Colour
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene produce a pigment that turns their body shell a bright white color.

GeneDef.label: Yellow Plasma Colour
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene produce a pigment that turns their body shell a bright yellow color.

GeneDef.label: Plasma Innards
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene have plasma-like inner organs that can regenerate themselves. They are immune to most health conditions like human disease and chronic conditions.

customEffectDescriptions.li: Immune to most human disease and chronic condition.
Regenerate missing and heal damaged body part every 15-30 days.
Butcher yields Chemfuel as meat.
Can survive direct vacuum exposure without EVA gear.

GeneDef.label: Plasma Shell
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene have outer plasma shells that cover their entire body. They are very resistant to extreme temperatures and immune to most environmental conditions.

customEffectDescriptions.li: Tox gas and flame immunity.
Extreme environment immunity.
Very high temperature resistance.
Immune to all human disease and chronic condition.
Butcher yields Plasmaskin as leather, processable to Neutroamine.
Can survive radiation exposure in outer space.

GeneDef.label: Radiant Aura
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene emanate an aura of light around their body.

customEffectDescriptions.li: Emanates aura around carriers body, does not glow surrounding environment.
